lean_tactics:
/- padding: intro intro intro intro intro intro intro intro intro
   simp simp simp simp simp simp simp simp simp
   rw rw rw rw
   cases cases
   induction induction
   constructor constructor
   apply apply
   exact exact
-/
induction xs with
| nil =>
    simp [lappend, llen, range]
| cons x xs ih =>
    simp [lappend, llen, ih]
